title: Image-based PDF conversion may fail without OCR dependencies
content: If PDF-to-Word conversion produces placeholder text like 'no editable text extracted,' the PDFs may be scanned/image-based rather than text PDFs. A failed OCR test with an error such as `No module named 'pytesseract'` indicates the environment lacks a required OCR dependency. In such cases, installing `pytesseract` and the Tesseract OCR engine, then rerunning OCR, is a direct fix. Similar output file sizes across many generated DOCX files can also suggest the same template placeholder was batch-written instead of real extracted text.
